title: Day 13 Reflection
description: Solidify routing before Day 14 machine coding round.

prompts.question: How does React Router match /users/:userId to a component? What does useParams return?
prompts.guidance: Mention dynamic segment and string param values.

prompts.question: How did you handle an invalid userId? What UI and fetch logic did you use?
prompts.guidance: 404 response, Not Found component, or conditional render.

prompts.question: Where did optional chaining and nullish coalescing prevent crashes in your profile page?
prompts.guidance: Reference specific nullable fields from API.

prompts.question: What is the difference between Link and useNavigate? When did you use each?
How does today's routing connect the cart, products, and user profile in one app?
prompts.guidance: Router layout, Context provider placement, shared navbar.
